DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-30-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT HEATHER DAVIS' DEMURRER to COMPLAINT:

Defendant Heather Davis's demurrer to the complaint is sustained without leave to amend. Defendant's request for judicial notice is granted. The complaint seeks to state a single cause of action for negligence (motor vehicle) arising out of an incident that occurred on September 29, 2018. Because the complaint was not filed until April 26, 2021, it is barred on its face by the two-year statute of limitations found in Code Civ. Proc. section 335.1, as extended to March 26, 2021 by Emergency Rule 9. The statute was not tolled by Plaintiff's filing of a prior small claims action. (Jellinek v. Superior Court (1991) 228 Cal.App.3d 652, 659-660.) Plaintiff's late-filed opposition fails to address this dispositive ground.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
